caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The man is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either recording a podcast or participating in an interview. The setting includes a wall adorned with framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. Throughout the video, the man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, possibly interacting with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setting, likely for a talk show or podcast recording.
